tlstractor 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • TLS-Tractor Tutorial
  • Changelog

Package index

Extract tracts and ancestry dosages

extract_tracts()
Extract Local-Ancestry Tracts from Phased VCF and MSP (RFMix2/Gnomix)
extract_tracts_flare()
Extract Local-Ancestry Tracts from a FLARE VCF file
convert_gds_to_txt()
Convert Local-Ancestry Tracts Format from GDS to Text
convert_txt_to_gds()
Convert Local-Ancestry Tracts Format from Text to GDS

Munge external GWAS summary statistics

munge_sumstats()
Munge GWAS Summary Statistics to Align with GDS File

Run TLS-Tractor

tlstractor()
Run TLS-Tractor
